stories.title: Build EXISTING_AUTOMATION_MAP.md
stories.description: Scan C:/Users/manaz/Desktop/Obsidian Main Vault and all project repos to map every existing cron, workflow, and n8n job to research/automation/EXISTING_AUTOMATION_MAP.md.

stories.title: Build config/agents.json
stories.description: Create the agents.json configuration file inside mazos-ui/config based on oh-my-claude specializations (advisor, risk-assessor, critic, code-reviewer, validator, librarian, security-auditor).

stories.title: Integrate Agents into MazOS UI
stories.description: Add the newly defined agents from config/agents.json into the MazOS frontend dashboard so they can be triggered visually.
